description: Invoice, bill, receipt, or payment record representing a request for payment

invoice_number.description: Unique invoice identifier or reference number (e.g., INV-2024-001)

customer.description: Customer or recipient name the invoice is issued to

currency.description: Currency code for the invoice amount (e.g., USD, EUR, CNY)

issue_date.description: Date the invoice was issued (ISO 8601 format)

status.description: Current payment status of the invoice

line_items.description: List of line items or services described on the invoice
